name: Fragment
description: Ledger-as-a-service API for engineers who build money-moving fintech products.

seo.title: Fragment — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Fragment: Ledger-as-a-service API for engineers who build money-moving fintech products.

when_to_use: Ledger-as-a-service for tracking money movement in fintech products
Double-entry accounting API for money-moving apps and wallets
Programmable ledger for marketplace escrow and multi-party settlement
Financial audit trail and balance tracking for complex payment flows

review.verdict: Exactly what you need if you're building money-movement products — but useless if you're not.
review.best_for: Engineers building fintech products needing correct double-entry ledgers
review.not_for: Merchants wanting payment acceptance or non-money-moving apps

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
